SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2007 - JUDGMENT. DEFT CATHERINE STEPANOV DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. IN LIEU OF CASH PAYMENT, DEFENDANT GOMES MAY SATISFY THE JUDGMENT BY RETURNING TO PLAINTIFF HER PERSONAL PROPERTY CONSISTING OF SIGNA WATCH; PINK PEARL NECKLACE AND BRACELET; TURQUOISE AND SILVER BRACLET AND MATCHING EARRINGS; SILVER "DIMES" EARRINGS; AND EQG-SHAPED TURQUOISE PENDANT NECKLACE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEPANOV, CATHERINE IN LIEU OF CASH PAYMENT:DEFT MAY SATISFY JUDGMENT BY RETURNING: SIGNA WATCH;PINK PEARL NECKLACE & BRACLET;TURQUOISE & SILVER BRACLET AND EARRINGS;SILVER DIMES EARRINGS;AND EGG-SHAPED TURQUOISE PENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
